meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Solve No Portfolio with Antigravity Template
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with no portfolio. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to build professional-grade SaaS apps in hours, not weeks.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap ends when you stop building toy apps and start shipping production-ready architecture. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you gain a modular, scalable foundation that mimics enterprise SaaS. Use Claude Code to automate the scaffolding, allowing you to showcase complex, functional systems to prospective clients immediately.
content.intro:
The cold reality of freelancing is that clients don't care about your potential; they care about your proof. You are stuck in a vicious cycle: you need clients to build a portfolio, but you need a portfolio to land clients. The clock is ticking, and every day without a live, high-impact project is money left on the table.

It is time to bypass the 'tutorial hell' phase. The Antigravity project template isn't just code; it is a battle-tested architecture designed to make your projects look like they were built by a ten-person engineering team. By pairing this with Claude Code, you can transform a single prompt into a sophisticated, deployable product that commands premium rates.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the base directory structure that enforces clean architecture and separation of concerns from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new SaaS project using the Antigravity enterprise template with Next.js 14, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Define Domain-Specific Models
steps.description: Use AI to generate high-fidelity data models that demonstrate your understanding of complex business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust Prisma schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application with subscription management and role-based access control.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema for multi-tenant saas'

steps.title: Implement Feature Modules
steps.description: Build modular features that showcase your ability to write maintainable, clean code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable feature module for an authenticated dashboard that fetches and displays real-time analytics from a Postgres database.

steps.title: Automate Integration Testing
steps.description: Prove your professional rigor by including automated tests that ensure your app never breaks under load.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write comprehensive Playwright integration tests for the authentication flow and user dashboard creation process.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate playwright tests for auth flows'

steps.title: Configure Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Set up a CI/CD pipeline that automates your path to production, turning your code into a live URL.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a GitHub Actions workflow for the Antigravity template to deploy to Vercel on every main branch push.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'configure github actions for vercel deployment'

pro_tips: Always include a 'Technical Debt' section in your README to show clients you understand long-term maintenance.
Use Claude Code to document your API endpoints automatically; it adds a layer of professional polish that juniors always miss.
Create a 'demo mode' toggle in your UI so prospects can experience the app without needing to sign up.
Focus on one 'hero' feature—like a complex data visualization—rather than building five half-baked features.
Always deploy to a custom subdomain; a project living on a 'vercel.app' URL looks like a student project, not a professional tool.
content.next_steps: Once your project is live, record a 60-second Loom video walking through the architecture and the business problem you solved. Embed this video directly on your portfolio site to convert viewers into clients.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to stop hunting for work and start demonstrating mastery. Stop building for yourself and start building for the market. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
